name: Anderson Park
description:
There is no dedicated parking for the courts. Make sure to park on the correct side of the street. 
Respect the neighborhood. A resident does call to report cars parked in the ‘No Parking this side of street’ zone.

name: Centennial Terrace
description: Centennial Terrace is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sylvania, OH. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Donald Z. Petroff pickleball courts
description: Donald Z. Petroff pickleball courts is a place to play pickleball in Oregon, OH. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Eastern Community YMCA
description: Eastern Community YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Oregon, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Fairfax Park
description: Come play pickleball at Fairfax Park in Bates, OH! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Holland Strawberry Acres Park
description: Holland Strawberry Acres Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Holland, OH. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Jermain Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jermain Park in Ryan, OH! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Keener Park
description: Lights are operational 5pm - 10pm that players can turn on themselves for an hour at a time.
hours: Monday 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM Phone: 419-865-7862 Formal Complaints If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Ohio Governor’s Office of the Americans with Disabilities Act at 614-466-5559. description: Come play pickleball at Maumee Bay State Park in Oregon, OH! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Pearson Metropark
description: FitPark: Pickleball, is a renovated tennis complex at Pearson with four pickleball and two tennis courts to meet the growing interest in pickleball

name: PickleZone LLC
description: Come play pickleball at PickleZone LLC in Holland, OH! There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, youth programming, restrooms, and locker rooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: Toledo Pickle Company
description: Toledo Pickle Company is a place to play pickleball in Toledo, OH. There are 12 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 10 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available.
